prerequisites: A Campayn account with API access enabled.
Your Campayn API key, found and regenerable in the Campayn Account section.
Your Campayn account subdomain (the sub_domain config field), which identifies your account host.

authMethods.name: API key (TRUEREST Authorization header)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the api_key secret field. Campayn passes it in the Authorization header using the TRUEREST scheme, in the form 'Authorization: TRUEREST apikey=<your_api_key>'. Anyone holding the key can access your Campayn data, so treat it like a password; regenerate it from the Account section if compromised.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Campayn and open the Account section, where the API key is shown and can be regenerated. Copy the key and supply it as the api_key field. Keep it secret, since it grants access to your lists, contacts, and reports.

setupSteps.title: Provide your account subdomain
setupSteps.body: Enter your Campayn account subdomain as the sub_domain config field. This identifies your account when the connector calls the JSON API (requests use versioned, HTTPS endpoints such as /api/v1/lists.json).

setupSteps.title: Configure and verify the connection
setupSteps.body: Save the connector with api_key and sub_domain set. The connector sends the key via the Authorization: TRUEREST apikey=... header against the v1 JSON API to confirm access.
